title: Localization and Internationalization
description: Formatting locale-specific content, durations, and switching languages

services.name: SettingsService
services.notes: Registers UITabLanguage (LanguageTag) among other tabs during _init()

services.name: BroadcastService
services.notes: Posts postMessage to all .window-app-iframe[data-appUsesSDK=true]. Saves broadcasts for future app instances when sendToNewAppInstances=true.

supporting_modules.name: i18n module
supporting_modules.notes: Looks up translations[window.locale].dictionary[key], falls back to 'en'. Handles %% and %strong% placeholders and {{var}} template substitution.

supporting_modules.name: UITabLanguage
ui_events: input .search-language → filter language list by name/code
supporting_modules.on_show: focus search input, show all items, clear search

supporting_modules.name: helpers (window globals)
functions: mutate_user_preferences(delta): persists each key via puter.kv.set('user_preferences.<key>', value); calls update_user_preferences(merged)

update_user_preferences(prefs): sets window.user_preferences, saves to localStorage, sets window.locale=language, calls broadcastService.sendBroadcast('localeChanged', {language}, {sendToNewAppInstances:true})

use_cases.name: Switch Language
flow: User opens Settings → Language tab (via SettingsService)
UITabLanguage renders language list via window.listSupportedLanguages()
changeLanguage(lang) sets window.locale and calls mutate_user_preferences({language})
mutate_user_preferences persists to puter.kv and calls update_user_preferences

use_cases.name: Translate UI Text
flow: Falls back to translations['en'].dictionary[key] if not found
Returns HTML-encoded string with placeholder substitutions

use_cases.name: Notify Apps of Locale Change
flow: Posts postMessage {msg:'broadcast', name:'localeChanged', data:{language}} to each iframe
Saves broadcast in #broadcastsToSendToNewAppInstances for future apps

use_cases.name: Receive Locale Change in App
flow: App re-renders locale-specific content using updated language

use_cases.name: Search Languages
flow: User types in search box within UITabLanguage

key_relationships: BroadcastService sends postMessage to AppIframe instances
BroadcastService.sendSavedBroadcastsTo(appInstanceID) replays saved broadcasts to new app instances
important_notes: Language is stored in window.locale (global), user_preferences object, localStorage, and puter.kv cloud store. 'localeChanged' broadcast uses sendToNewAppInstances=true so newly launched apps also get the current locale. i18n falls back to 'en' if a key is missing in the selected locale. LocaleService.format_duration only uses i18n for the 'seconds' label; MM:SS and HH:MM:SS formats are locale-independent.
